name: SoftJunk Lead Follow-Up Answer Engine
purpose: Answer high-intent lead follow-up questions and route buyers to the $5 custom follow-up sequence or kit.

recommended_path.if: The buyer already has a weak follow-up message
The buyer wants the shortest free sample and checkout path for one quiet lead
The buyer wants to estimate the value of lost follow-up
The buyer wants a full custom sequence
The buyer is ready to pay

copy_ready_answers.question: What should I text a lead after a missed call?
copy_ready_answers.short_answer: Name the missed call, offer help, and ask for one easy next step.
copy_ready_answers.sample: Hi [Name], sorry I missed your call about [service]. I can help. Do you want the fastest available time, or should I answer one quick question first?
copy_ready_answers.paid_upgrade: Custom 7-day sequence with Day 0, 1, 3, 5, and 7 missed-call recovery messages.

copy_ready_answers.question: How do I follow up after sending an estimate?
copy_ready_answers.short_answer: Reference the estimate, remove friction, and ask whether price, timing, or scope is blocking the decision.
copy_ready_answers.sample: Hi [Name], checking that you saw the estimate for [project]. If the scope looks right, I can send the next step. If price or timing is the blocker, reply with that and I will adjust the path.
copy_ready_answers.paid_upgrade: Custom 7-day estimate follow-up sequence with objection handling.

copy_ready_answers.question: How do I reply when a lead says the price is too high?
copy_ready_answers.short_answer: Acknowledge the concern and offer a smaller or clearer next step instead of arguing.
copy_ready_answers.sample: Totally fair to compare options. If budget is the main issue, I can show the smallest useful version first or explain what is included so you can decide.
copy_ready_answers.paid_upgrade: Custom price-objection reply plus a complete follow-up sequence.

copy_ready_answers.question: What should I send after a no-show?
copy_ready_answers.short_answer: Keep the tone neutral and make rescheduling easy.
copy_ready_answers.sample: Hi [Name], looks like today got busy. Do you want me to send another time for [service], or should I close this for now?
copy_ready_answers.paid_upgrade: Custom no-show recovery and close-the-loop sequence.

copy_ready_answers.question: How do I follow up with a quiet DM lead?
copy_ready_answers.short_answer: Use a low-pressure reply with a one-word response option.
copy_ready_answers.sample: Hi [Name], quick follow-up on [service]. If you are still interested, reply with "times" and I will send the easiest next step. If not, no problem.
copy_ready_answers.paid_upgrade: Custom DM follow-up sequence for one business and one service.

fulfillment_rule: Do not mark the order paid or delivered until the seller can see the 5 USD PayPal transaction, the API verifier returns PAYPAL_PAYMENT_VERIFIED=true, or a trusted seller-side PayPal CSV export returns PAYPAL_PAYMENT_VERIFIED=true source=csv.
